simple_types.name: Color_Component

array_types.name: RGB32_Display_Buffer

record_types.name: RGB32_Color

access_types.name: RGB32_Display_Buffer_Access
access_types.code:
type RGB32_Display_Buffer_Access is access all RGB32_Display_Buffer with
  Convention => C;

subtypes.name: Display_Horizontal_Range
subtypes.code: subtype Display_Horizontal_Range is Natural range 0 .. Display_Width - 1;

subtypes.name: Display_Vertical_Range
subtypes.code: subtype Display_Vertical_Range is Natural range 0 .. Display_Height - 1;
